Off Calendar Feb-25-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ELISA GOMES' Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And Request For Sanctions.

Plaintiff Elisa Gomes's Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And Request For Sanctions is GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART.

(see word minutes for full details)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling and drop a hard copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
